heading: Rules
label: 6298 Rules
text: The Commission and the Secretary may each issue such rules as each deems necessary to carry out the provisions of this part.
notes: Amendments1978— substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”, meaning Administrator of the Federal Energy Administration.Pub. L. 95–619
amendments: Amendments1978— substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”, meaning Administrator of the Federal Energy Administration.Pub. L. 95–619
